sections.paragraph:
Καισάρεια, ας, ἡ [Καῖσαρ] Caesarea, name of cities in honor of various emperors

—1. Caesarea Philippi, at the foot of Mt. Hermon, Lebanon, named by Philip the Tetrarch in honor of Tiberius Caesar Mt 16:13; Mk 8:27.

—2. Caesarea of Palestine, near Mt. Carmel, named in honor of Augustus Caesar Ac 8:40 and oft. in Ac.
